*   General

## Soda Boutique Apartment Danang

ex.Soda Apartment

Providing 8 rooms, Soda Boutique Apartment Danang hotel is 2.3 km from Dragon Bridge.

While staying in this Da Nang hotel, you are invited to discover the pink Danang Cathedral, located nearly 10 minutes' drive away, or visit sports venues like the multi - purpose Chi Lang Stadium, which is nearly 15 minutes' drive away. The hotel is situated 2.5 km from the cable-stayed Han River Bridge. The area also includes natural sights like the Scenic My Khe Public Beach within a few blocks of the Soda Boutique Apartment Danang. Vuon cay canh Cong Thuan bus stop is about 10 minutes' walk from the property.

The rooms at this Da Nang hotel have a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, along with a kettle for your convenience. An air conditioner are featured for guests' comfort. Featuring a separate toilet and a shower, the bathrooms also come with shower caps and bath sheets.

Serving Asian meals, Thung Phi BBQ lies in close proximity to the Soda Boutique Apartment Danang.

## Room overview

The rooms at this Da Nang hotel have a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, along with a kettle for your convenience. An air conditioner are featured for guests' comfort. Featuring a separate toilet and a shower, the bathrooms also come with shower caps and bath sheets.

![Image 4](https://apt-soda.danang-hotels.com/data/Photos/300x300w/17440/1744036/1744036037.JPEG)

Deluxe Family Room

2 Double beds

Room details

The well-fitted kitchenette has a stovetop, a refrigerator, a microwave and an electric kettle. This air-conditioned family room is comprised of a flat-screen TV with streaming services and a private bathroom. The unit has 2 beds.

Về chúng tôi

## Sofiana - Viên Ngọc bí ẩn giữa dòng thời gian

Sofiana Mỹ Khê Hotel & Spa định nghĩa sự sang trọng bằng sự kết nối và chân thành. Tại đây, mỗi kỳ nghỉ không chỉ là một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng, mà còn là hành trình cảm nhận văn hóa địa phương.

Sofiana là ngôi nhà thứ hai - nơi bạn được chào đón như người thân quen, và được sống trong bầu không khí đậm chất Đà Nẵng.

Tận hưởng dịch vụ tinh tế, không gian ấm cúng và sự hiếu khách chân thành

## Orange City Center Hotel Da Nang - Near Han Market & Dragon Brigde

ex.Orange Hotel - Near The Airport, Train Station, Service From The Heart, Open 24 Hours

Offrant des bicyclettes à louer, Orange City Center Hotel Da Nang - Near Han Market & Dragon Brigde Đà Nẵng est situé à 5 minutes à pied du spa Naomi. Bénéficiant d'un emplacement non loin du Marché Han, cet hotel 3 étoiles propose 75 chambres et un bar lounge sur place.

L'hotel contemporain est au cœur même de Đà Nẵng, à moins de 350 mètres du Stade de Chi Lang. Le Pont du Dragon se trouve dans les environs d'Orange City Center Hotel Da Nang - Near Han Market & Dragon Brigde, tandis que l'aéroport international de Đà Nẵng est à 5 km. Des vacances en famille à Đà Nẵng deviendront encore plus excitantes si vous visitez le Parc à thème Asia Park situé à 3 km de cet hotel. L'arrêt de bus Doi dien 189 Le Loi est à côté de l'hotel.

Certaines chambres climatisées sont dotées d'une cheminée et des fenêtres insonorisées, ainsi que d'options indépendantes telles qu'un minibar. Meublées d'un placard et d'un bureau, ces chambres disposent d'un coin salon et d'un coin repas. Dotées d'une baignoire spa, certaines salles de bains sont équipées d'articles de toilette gratuits et d'un bonnet de douche.

Le petit déjeuner est servi ici de 07:00 à 10:00. Vous pourrez également déguster des plats de cuisine Vietnamese au restaurant Com Ga A.Hai juste à côté d'Orange City Center Hotel Da Nang - Near Han Market & Dragon Brigde.

content: Experience an abundance of unparalleled facilities and features at Hotel Del Luna Boutique. Maintain seamless communication using the complimentary Wi-Fi at hotel.Effortlessly arrange transportation to and from the airport using the hotel's airport transfer services. Discovering Da Nang becomes even more accessible through the taxi and shuttle amenities provided at the hotel. For visitors traveling by automobile, complimentary parking is available. During your stay at this fantastic hotel, the attentive front desk personnel can provide you with a range of amenities such as concierge service, luggage storage and safety deposit boxes.Obtaining passes for the town's top entertainments becomes effortless with hotel's ticket service.At the hotel, utilize the on-site dry cleaning service and laundry service to maintain your beloved travel attire fresh, allowing you to bring fewer clothes. Craving relaxation? Make the most of your stay at the Hotel Del Luna Boutique with convenient amenities like room service and daily housekeeping at your disposal. Kindly note that smoking is prohibited in the hotel to ensure fresher air for all visitors. For visitors wishing to smoke, designated smoking zones can be found.At Hotel Del Luna Boutique, every guestroom is provided with convenient amenities and fittings to ensure a comfortable stay.Enhance your experience at hotel with the knowledge that certain rooms are equipped with linen service, blackout curtains and air conditioning for your convenience. At Hotel Del Luna Boutique, each visit offers an array of intriguing room configurations, featuring accommodations with separate living room and balcony or terrace, ensuring a distinct experience every time.Certain rooms boast in-room amusement features such as television and cable TV, offering guests an enjoyable stay. In select rooms within the hotel, a refrigerator, bottled water, instant coffee, instant tea and mini bar is available to cater to your requirements when desired.In the hotel, certain guest bathrooms come equipped with essential bathroom amenities, such as a hair dryer, toiletries and bathrobes, ensuring a comfortable stay for guests. Be sure to stop by the elegant executive lounge where you can experience the lavish amenities and ambiance. Begin your day carefree at Hotel Del Luna Boutique, as complimentary breakfast is offered for your convenience. Begin your day feeling refreshed and invigorated as you enjoy a delightful cup of quality coffee available at the cafe situated within the hotel.At the hotel, an assortment of easily accessible and delicious meal choices are available to satisfy your appetite whenever it strikes.Enjoy an entertaining evening with your fellow travelers at the hotel's bar.During your stay at hotel, an array of engaging activities and amenities guarantees a delightful experience. During your stay, don't forget to allocate some moments to experience the readily available shoreline.Be sure to drop by the pool at hotel at least

name: 14. Village Danang Resort
content:
Title: PREMIER VILLAGE DANANG RESORT MANAGED BY ACCOR – Family Resort in Da Nang | From 389$/Night | FamilyResort.net

URL Source: https://premiervillagedanang.familyresort.net/

Markdown Content:
5-star beachfront resort in Danang

### Amenities

Premier Village Danang Resort Managed By Accor offers a private beach along with two foot-massage areas and seven treatment rooms at Sứ Spa. Guests can enjoy the fitness center which is open 24/7 and includes a variety of equipment. The resort also provides bike rentals for exploring the scenic surroundings.

### Rooms

The resort features a selection of villas, including Garden View and Beachfront options, each equipped with a private swimming pool and fully-equipped kitchen. Spacious bedrooms and bathrooms provide ample comfort for guests. Every villa is designed for family gatherings or intimate stays, enhancing the vacation experience.

### Dining

On-site dining options include the Lemongrass Restaurant and Cá Chuồn Cồ, which serve a mix of traditional Vietnamese cuisine and international dishes. The Nautica Beach Club offers a relaxing poolside dining experience with ocean views. In-villa dining is also available with options for BBQ prepared by a private chef.

### Wellness

Sứ Spa provides a range of treatment options using local herbs and techniques for ultimate relaxation. The spa includes private treatment rooms, dry and steam saunas, making it a sanctuary for wellness seekers. Guests can rejuvenate in a tranquil environment designed for refreshment and healing.

### Family-Friendly

Children can enjoy a dedicated Kids Club, where they are entertained by qualified supervisors and have access to various activities. The resort also offers complimentary game and movie rentals to enhance family time. Spacious villas accommodate families comfortably, ensuring everyone has a memorable stay.

### Highlights

Location: Direct walking access to the ocean

Rooms: Private swimming pool in every villa

Dining: Extensive in-villa dining options

Wealth of activities: Complimentary game and movie rentals

Wellness: Private treatment options at Sứ Spa

Family-Friendly: Supervised Kids Club activities

“Located a short drive from Da Nang, the property distinguishes itself with its beachfront villas, each featuring a private pool and garden. I appreciate the resort's focus on both family leisure and business needs, offering specialized meeting spaces within the lush villa grounds. The holistic spa and in-villa dining enhance the sense of relaxed luxury.”
